TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: uzai a tsautsau ka sitsuayan a puanemanema.
S.PHON: uzai a ¶au ¶au ka si ¶uajan a puan…ôman…ôma.
S.FORM: uzai a caucau ka sicuayan a puanemanema.
S.PHON: uzai a ¶au ¶au ka si ¶uajan a puan…ôman…ôma.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there was a rich person.

S.FORM: manu kamayan a mangtjez a tsaŠłć; ini papaulingavi timadju.
S.PHON: manu kamajan a maŇčc…ôz a ¶a…Ė; ini papau…≠iŇčavi tima…Ču.
S.FORM: manu kamayan a mangtjez a cadr; ini papaulingavi timadju.
S.PHON: manu kamajan a maŇč ¶…ôz a ¶a…Ė; ini papau…£iŇčavi tima…Ču.
S.TRANSL: Thieves kept coming and (s)he didn‚Äôt feel secure.

S.FORM: qau kinemnem timadju tu "kudain tsu a tsaŠłć sa karekutj?" aya timadju a kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau kin…ômn…ôm tima…Ču tu "kudain ¶u a ¶a…Ė sa kar…ôkuc" aja tima…Ču a kin…ômn…ôm.
S.FORM: qau kinemnem timadju tu "kudain cu a cadr sa karekutj?" aya timadju a kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau kin…ômn…ôm tima…Ču tu "kudain ¶u a ¶a…Ė sa kaR…ôku ¶" aja tima…Ču a kin…ômn…ôm.
S.TRANSL: So he thought: ‚ÄúWhat can be done to these thieves to frighten them?‚ÄĚ he thought.

S.FORM: …ęakua ini ke…ęang timadju tu kudain.
S.PHON: éakua ini k…ô éaŇč tima…Ču tu kudain.
S.FORM: ljakua ini keljang timadju tu kudain.
S.PHON: éakua ini k…ô éaŇč tima…Ču tu kudain.
S.TRANSL: But he didn‚Äôt know what to do.

S.FORM: manu mangtjez a vuluvulung a tsautsau.
S.PHON: manu maŇčc…ôz a vu…≠uvu…≠uŇč a ¶au ¶au.
S.FORM: manu mangtjez a vuluvulung a caucau.
S.PHON: manu maŇč ¶…ôz a vu…£uvu…£uŇč a ¶au ¶au.
S.TRANSL: Now an old person came,

S.FORM: kivadaqan timadju: "anema su kinemnemnemen?" ayain a kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: kivadaqan tima…Ču: "an…ôma su kin…ômn…ômn…ôm…ôn" ajain a kivadaq tima…Ču.
S.FORM: kivadaqan timadju: "anema su kinemnemnemen?" ayain a kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: kivadaqan tima…Ču: "an…ôma su kin…ômn…ômn…ôm…ôn" ajain a kivadaq tima…Ču.
S.TRANSL: and asked him: ‚ÄúWhat are you thinking about?‚ÄĚ he was asked.

S.FORM: qau tjemuma…ę tua varung nimadju: "avan tsu a tsaŠłć a tjuruvu aravats.
S.PHON: qau c…ômuma é tua varuŇč nima…Ču: "avan ¶u a ¶a…Ė a curuvu arava ¶.
S.FORM: qau tjemumalj tua varung nimadju: "avan cu a cadr a tjuruvu aravac.
S.PHON: qau ¶…ômuma é tua vaRuŇč nima…Ču: "avan ¶u a ¶a…Ė a ¶uRuvu aRava ¶.
S.TRANSL: So he told him what was on his mind: ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs this large number of thieves.

S.FORM: ku kudain sa kasualap?, aya ku varung.
S.PHON: ku kudain sa kasua…≠ap Ē, aja ku varuŇč.
S.FORM: ku kudain sa kasualap', aya ku varung.
S.PHON: ku kudain sa kasua…£ap Ē, aja ku vaRuŇč.
S.TRANSL: What am I to do to get rid of them is what I am thinking.

S.FORM: …ęakua ini ku ke…ęang.
S.PHON: éakua ini ku k…ô éaŇč.
S.FORM: ljakua ini ku keljang.
S.PHON: éakua ini ku k…ô éaŇč.
S.TRANSL: But I don‚Äôt know what to do.

S.FORM: nu kem…ęang sun, tjuma…ęi aken," aya azua puanemanema a tsautsau.
S.PHON: nu k…ôm éaŇč sun, cuma éi ak…ôn," aja azua puan…ôman…ôma a ¶au ¶au.
S.FORM: nu kemljang sun, tjumalji aken," aya azua puanemanema a caucau.
S.PHON: nu k…ôm éaŇč sun, ¶uma éi ak…ôn," aja azua puan…ôman…ôma a ¶au ¶au.
S.TRANSL: If you know, tell me,‚ÄĚ said the rich person.

S.FORM: "manu avan azua su kinemnemnemen.
S.PHON: "manu avan azua su kin…ômn…ômn…ôm…ôn.
S.FORM: "manu avan azua su kinemnemnemen.
S.PHON: "manu avan azua su kin…ômn…ômn…ôm…ôn.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúSo that‚Äôs what you are thinking about.

S.FORM: …ęakua maya mapuvarung.
S.PHON: éakua maja mapuvaruŇč.
S.FORM: ljakua maya mapuvarung.
S.PHON: éakua maja mapuvaRuŇč.
S.TRANSL: But don‚Äôt worry.

S.FORM: kem…ęang aken aravats," ayain.
S.PHON: k…ôm éaŇč ak…ôn arava ¶," ajain.
S.FORM: kemljang aken aravac," ayain.
S.PHON: k…ôm éaŇč ak…ôn aRava ¶," ajain.
S.TRANSL: I know very well what to do,‚ÄĚ he was told.

S.FORM: qau maleva azua puanemanema a tsautsau.
S.PHON: qau ma…≠…ôva azua puan…ôman…ôma a ¶au ¶au.
S.FORM: qau maleva azua puanemanema a caucau.
S.PHON: qau ma…£…ôva azua puan…ôman…ôma a ¶au ¶au.
S.TRANSL: So the rich person was glad.

S.FORM: "nu maitazua sa kem…ęang sun, tjuma…ęi aken."
S.PHON: "nu maitazua sa k…ôm éaŇč sun, cuma éi ak…ôn."
S.FORM: "nu maitazua sa kemljang sun, tjumalji aken."
S.PHON: "nu maitazua sa k…ôm éaŇč sun, ¶uma éi ak…ôn."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúIf you really know, tell me.‚ÄĚ

S.FORM: "ui, ku tjuma…ęay sun.
S.PHON: "ui, ku cuma éaj sun.
S.FORM: "ui, ku tjumaljay sun.
S.PHON: "ui, ku ¶uma éaj sun.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúYes, I‚Äôll tell you.

S.FORM: uzai a vatu a ku …ęineng…ęengan i Guru…ęan a liaw aravats, maya kinababulay anga.
S.PHON: uzai a vatu a ku éin…ôŇč é…ôŇčan i guru éan a …≠iaw arava ¶, maja kinababu…≠aj aŇča.
S.FORM: uzai a vatu a ku ljinengljengan i Guruljan a liaw aravac, maya kinababulay anga.
S.PHON: uzai a vatu a ku éin…ôŇč é…ôŇčan i guRu éan a …£iaw aRava ¶, maja kinababu…£aj aŇča.
S.TRANSL: I have seen plenty of dogs on Guru…ęan mountain, and fine ones too.

S.FORM: …ęakua nu muri vaik itjen a kivatu a sema zua, katsen itjen nua vatu.
S.PHON: éakua nu muri vaik ic…ôn a kivatu a s…ôma zua, ka ¶…ôn ic…ôn nua vatu.
S.FORM: ljakua nu muri vaik itjen a kivatu a sema zua, kacen itjen nua vatu.
S.PHON: éakua nu muRi vaik i ¶…ôn a kivatu a s…ôma zua, ka ¶…ôn i ¶…ôn nua vatu.
S.TRANSL: But if we go there to get dogs, we‚Äôll be bitten by the dogs.

S.FORM: …ęakua nu tja saneqavayi tua vaqu, sa tja pataudi tua quva…ę a qavay, sa tja pakani a kina nua vatu; qau sedjeketsan a anga…ę nua qavay; qau mapusemualap a kina nua vatu.
S.PHON: éakua nu ca san…ôqavaji tua vaqu, sa ca pataudi tua quva é a qavaj, sa ca pakani a kina nua vatu; qau s…ô…Č…ôk…ô ¶an a aŇča é nua qavaj; qau mapus…ômua…≠ap a kina nua vatu.
S.FORM: ljakua nu tja saneqavayi tua vaqu, sa tja pataudi tua quvalj a qavay, sa tja pakani a kina nua vatu; qau sedjekecan a angalj nua qavay; qau mapusemualap a kina nua vatu.
S.PHON: éakua nu ¶a san…ôqavaji tua vaqu, sa ¶a pataudi tua quva é a qavaj, sa ¶a pakani a kina nua vatu; qau s…ô…Č…ôk…ô ¶an a aŇča é nua qavaj; qau mapus…ômua…£ap a kina nua vatu.
S.TRANSL: But if we make dumplings of millet and mix hair in the dumplings, and feed them to the mother dog, then her mouth will get stuck up with the dumpling, and the mother dog will do nothing but try to get rid of it.

S.FORM: qau nuka tja sazuain anga, ini anga ke…ęang a vatu tu tja alalapen a a…ęak.
S.PHON: qau nuka ca sazuain aŇča, ini aŇča k…ô éaŇč a vatu tu ca a…≠a…≠ap…ôn a a éak.
S.FORM: qau nuka tja sazuain anga, ini anga keljang a vatu tu tja alalapen a aljak.
S.PHON: qau nuka ¶a sazuain aŇča, ini aŇča k…ô éaŇč a vatu tu ¶a a…£a…£ap…ôn a a éak.
S.TRANSL: Then even if we go there, the dog won‚Äôt know that we are taking away her puppies.

S.FORM: tja alapen a a…ęak; qau tja katsuin a tjumaq azua kuku, sa tja pakani.
S.PHON: ca a…≠ap…ôn a a éak; qau ca ka ¶uin a cumaq azua kuku, sa ca pakani.
S.FORM: tja alapen a aljak; qau tja kacuin a tjumaq azua kuku, sa tja pakani.
S.PHON: ¶a a…£ap…ôn a a éak; qau ¶a ka ¶uin a ¶umaq azua kuku, sa ¶a pakani.
S.TRANSL: We‚Äôll take the puppies, and bring them home, and feed them.

S.FORM: qau nu meqatsa azua kuku, gemurugur a kemats anga, nu mangtjez a tsaŠłć nu qezemezemetj.
S.PHON: qau nu m…ôqa ¶a azua kuku, g…ômurugur a k…ôma ¶ aŇča, nu maŇčc…ôz a ¶a…Ė nu q…ôz…ôm…ôz…ôm…ôc.
S.FORM: qau nu meqaca azua kuku, gemurugur a kemac anga, nu mangtjez a cadr nu qezemezemetj.
S.PHON: qau nu m…ôqa ¶a azua kuku, g…ômuRuguR a k…ôma ¶ aŇča, nu maŇč ¶…ôz a ¶a…Ė nu q…ôz…ôm…ôz…ôm…ô ¶.
S.TRANSL: When the puppies get big, they‚Äôll bark and bite, if a thief comes at night.

S.FORM: qau nu katsen nu guruguren a tsaŠłć, ini anga turu a mangtjez a
S.PHON: qau nu ka ¶…ôn nu gurugur…ôn a ¶a…Ė, ini aŇča turu a maŇčc…ôz a
S.FORM: qau nu kacen nu guruguren a cadr, ini anga turu a mangtjez a
S.PHON: qau nu ka ¶…ôn nu guRuguR…ôn a ¶a…Ė, ini aŇča tuRu a maŇč ¶…ôz a
S.TRANSL: tsemakaw.‚ÄĚ
